caption: A video sequence shows Joe Biden, dressed in a dark suit, white shirt, and a blue and white patterned tie, appearing in a split-screen composition against an outdoor backdrop of the White House and a blue sky with white clouds. Beside him, the scene features close-up shots of two large burgers served with golden-brown potato wedges. The foreground burger is a multi-layered stack with patties, melted cheese, and a sesame seed bun, held together by a wooden skewer. To its left, a smaller burger and a bowl of potato wedges are visible. As the sequence progresses, the images remain static, maintaining the same composition and framing. The White House stands in the background with a flagpole visible, and the lighting is bright and consistent across all frames. No on-screen text or logos are present.
